With her professional license as a Vacuum Juggler Title holder, Eleanor Smith stands out in the entertainment community. She earned her degree from Vermilion Crest College, where she refined her artistic abilities. Alongside her performance career, Eleanor volunteers as a board member for the Education Champion Starflower Mission, promoting educational causes. Her literary works are published by Sapphire Acorn Books, adding depth to her artistic portfolio. Additionally, Eleanor's proficiency in Estonian grammar plays a significant role in her performances, providing a unique blend of language and art.
